summary: Tested Analisi Consulenziale feature - complete consultancy workflow with 4 states. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend modal works correctly with 4 tabs (Overview, Analisi Preliminare, Script Call, Analisi Finale). PDF exports working. Systeme.io tag integration for email automation.
seed_data_creation: Test client 'Test Att' already has all workflow data from manual testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analisi Consulenziale feature is complete. Test client 'Test Att' (id: 0aad124a-4fd2-4159-b75a-86b3481ddb5f) has all workflow steps completed: questionario_ricevuto → analisi_preliminare_generata → analisi_finale_da_revisionare → analisi_consegnata. The Consulenziale button appears for clients with questionario_compilato=true AND pagamento_analisi=true. Filter by 'Analisi pronte' to find eligible clients.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/analisi-consulenziale/stato/{us: ✅ Returns complete analysis state with timestamps
backend_endpoints.POST /api/analisi-consulenziale/genera-p: ✅ Generates internal preliminary analysis with AI
backend_endpoints.POST /api/analisi-consulenziale/genera-f: ✅ Generates final analysis document with AI
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/analisi-consulenziale/modifica-: ✅ Admin can edit sections of final analysis
backend_endpoints.POST /api/analisi-consulenziale/approva-: ✅ Approves and sends to client via Systeme.io tag
backend_endpoints.GET /api/analisi-consulenziale/analisi-f: ✅ Downloads final analysis PDF for client

frontend_modal.tab_overview: ✅ Shows timeline with 4 steps and status cards
frontend_modal.tab_analisi_preliminare: ✅ Shows internal analysis with profilo, punti forza, criticità, domande call, note
frontend_modal.tab_script_call: ✅ Shows 8 expandable blocks with Scarica PDF button
frontend_modal.tab_analisi_finale: ✅ Shows final document with editable sections and Scarica PDF Cliente button

workflow_states.questionario_ricevuto: ✅ Initial state when questionnaire is submitted
workflow_states.analisi_consegnata: ✅ After admin approves and sends to client

systeme_io_integration.purpose: Triggers automated email to client when analysis is approved
systeme_io_integration.note: Systeme.io API may not respond if API key is not configured - this is expected behavior
